DescribePlannedEventRecords.action: Action performed on the instance; value for this API: DescribePlannedEventRecords
DescribePlannedEventRecords.productCategory: Product category of the affected instance (BBC / BCC / HPAS)
DescribePlannedEventRecords.serverEventLogTimeFilter: Query events within the periodStartTime–periodEndTime range by event log type; supported values: EventCreate, EventAuthorize, EventExecuting, RejectCheckResult
DescribePlannedEventRecords.periodStartTime: Start time for the timeFilter range; if empty, only periodEndTime is applied; must conform to BCE date format
DescribePlannedEventRecords.periodEndTime: End time for the timeFilter range; if empty, only periodStartTime is applied; must conform to BCE date format
DescribePlannedEventRecords.maxKeys: Maximum number of records per page; usually no more than 100; default is 10
DescribePlannedEventRecords.marker: Starting event ID for paginated list queries
